idle: Never give up — but take breaks!
sad: I won't cry... okay, maybe a little.
morning: Rise and shine! A shinobi is always ready!
New day, new chance to get closer to Hokage!
Up early? That's the ninja way!
afternoon: Keep pushing! The afternoon is not over!
Hard work beats talent! Keep going!
Even Hokage take lunch breaks. One only!
evening: Another day of hard work — you did it!
Evening ramen sounds perfect right now...
Almost time to rest, but never give up!
The village is quiet in the evening.
night: Even at night, a ninja stays vigilant!
Rest up. Tomorrow's training will be tougher!
Dream of getting stronger, believe it!
Night missions are the best missions.
